creator: lists.dan@gmail.com
text:
With "keep frags" removed from my ipfilter rules the machine ran for 14 days with no crash.  I put the "keep frags" back and it crashed in 1 day 21 hours.  It crashed in ipf_frag_known again.

There appears to be a bug in the ipfilter code related to "keep frags."

As a test, I am loading the aio kernel module as suggested to see if that makes a difference.  I am leaving "keep frags" in for this test.
